name: sloth
description: sloth - content management for the lazy
author: phuhuynh <phuhh98@gmail.com>

lint-staged.packages/contracts/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,m: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @sloth/contracts run build:registry && pnpm --filter @sloth/contracts run test'
lint-staged.apps/docs/**/*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,mjs,cjs,js: sh -c 'pnpm --filter apps-docs run test:registry && pnpm --filter apps-docs run build'
lint-staged.packages/strapi-plugin/{package.json,tsc: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @sloth/strapi-plugin run test:ts:front && pnpm --filter @sloth/strapi-plugin run test:ts:back'
